analysis.title: Staffing analysis
analysis.noTargetsBody: Define how many employees you want per service in Prefs → Staffing Targets to enable analysis.

howItWorks.indicator1: Demand (h/wk) — total hours required by your staffing targets in a typical week.
howItWorks.indicator2: Contract (h/wk) — sum of contracted hours of all employees in the role (kitchen or floor).
howItWorks.indicator3: Surplus / Deficit (h/wk) — difference between contract and demand. Positive = extra hours, negative = missing hours.
howItWorks.indicator4: Verdict — oversized (>20% surplus), balanced (10-20%), tight (<10%), undersized (deficit).
howItWorks.indicator5: Understaffed / tight slots — number of slots where the solver fails to meet the target, or barely meets it.
howItWorks.engineBody: CP-SAT constraint optimization — a mathematical optimization technique. The <link>Google OR-Tools CP-SAT</link> solver resolves this program to find the best possible assignment.

expansion.title: Possible openings
expansion.empty: No relevant additional opening — all slots are already open or there is no comparable history.

actions.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate this employee? They will be removed from the active roster and from auto-staffing.

hiring.generateContractLabel: Generate the {{type}} contract immediately after creation
hiring.inviteSelfServiceHint: — they'll receive a link to fill in address, IBAN and emergency contact before the DPAE.
hiring.inviteSelfServiceLabel: Invite the employee to complete their profile

addModal.legendSelfService: = can be completed by the employee from their workspace

position.addSubRoleButtonTooltip: Add a sub-role to the {{role}} catalog
position.newSubRoleHeader: New sub-role for {{role}} — will be added to the restaurant catalog.
position.noSkillsWarning: Without skills, auto-staffing won't be able to target specific positions.
position.subRoleHelpHcr: The highest sub-role automatically determines the HCR level below.

priority.helpBody1Prefix: When auto-staffing has to choose between several available employees for the same slot, it favours those at
priority.helpBody2: Useful for distinguishing a regular (priority 1) from a seasonal or extra worker (priority 3) without excluding them entirely — they remain available if the main team can't cover everything.
priority.label: Priority

addModal.selfServiceBadgeTooltip: The employee can complete this field from their personal workspace
addModal.successBody: {{name}} is now part of the team.
addModal.successInviteNote: An invitation will be sent to collect the remaining information (address, IBAN, emergency contact).
addModal.title: New employee

tempAbsenceModal.description: <0>{{name}}</0> will be greyed out in the list and ignored by auto-staffing during this period.
tempAbsenceModal.title: Temporary absence

permissions.title: Manager permissions
permissions.intro: Toggle each item to adjust what this manager can do. By default a manager has access to everything except billing, preferences and role management.
